case_title: DALT HOTEL, L.P. VS. SAOPHATA SOUVANDANDARA et al

docket_entries.description: REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT SOUVANDANDARA, SAOPHATA

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF DALT HOTEL, L.P. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT SOUVANDANDARA, SAOPHATA THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 34 TURK STREET, UNIT NO. 542, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94102, **JUDGMENT ALSO APPLIES TO ALL UNKNOWN/UNNAMED OCCUPANTS OF THE PREMISES.**
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT SOUVANDANDARA, SAOPHATA
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT SOUVANDANDARA, SAOPHATA
RECEIVED REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT, CLERK'S JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DALT HOTEL, L.P. AS TO DEFENDANT SOUVANDANDARA, SAOPHATA
DECLARATION RE: UNAVAILABILITY OF ORIGINAL RENTAL/LEASE AGREEMENT. FILED BY PLAINTIFF DALT HOTEL, L.P.
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DALT HOTEL, L.P. SERVED MAY-28-2013, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SOUVANDANDARA, SAOPHATA

UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DALT HOTEL, L.P. AS TO DEFENDANT SOUVANDANDARA, SAOPHATA DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF DALT HOTEL, L.P. SERVED MAY-28-2013, PRE-JUDGEMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT AS TO DEFENDANT DOES 1 TO 10, INCLUSIVE
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $17.50 FILED BY PLAINTIFF DALT HOTEL, L.P.
